Kadir Has University

Industrial Engineering

Kadir Has University Department of Industrial Engineering aims to train engineers specialised in the design, development and management of production and service systems. The department is accredited by MÜDEK and the medium of instruction is English. Students have the opportunity to specialise in core courses such as optimisation, simulation, production planning and control as well as elective courses such as supply chain management, logistics and health systems optimisation. The department has a strong academic staff and international collaborations. Graduates have successful careers in sectors such as energy, logistics, manufacturing, software, finance, banking and telecommunications.
